$schema: Edit this file to manage Syncle's daily catalog. Run `npm run build:manifest` (or just `npm run dev` / `npm run build`) to refresh public/songs/manifest.json from this config + the GitHub Release.
//pickStrategy: How to pick a chart on each page load. 'daily' uses the schedule below (production). 'random' picks a random pool entry, fetched from public mirrors at runtime — falls back to local songs if mirrors are down (great for testing).
//songs: Local songs in public/songs/. Used in 'daily' mode and as fallback when 'random' mode can't reach any mirror.
//pool: Beatmapset ids fetched from public mirrors (catboy.best / osu.direct / nerinyan.moe) at runtime when pickStrategy=random. Each entry: { id: <beatmapsetId>, diff?: <case-insensitive substring of difficulty Version>, label?: <human note> }. Find ids via `npm run fetch-song -- search <query>` or by URL on osu.ppy.sh/beatmapsets/<id>.
